title: Endersteel
description:
A vanilla-ish mod that adds 2 new tool and armor sets:
STEEL, which is in between iron and diamond, and
ENDERSTEEL, which is above netherite.
body:
This mod adds 2 new tool and armor types:
1. Steel which is between Iron and Diamond tiers.
2. Endersteel which is above Netherite.

Enderscrap ore drops Raw enderscrap which needs to be refined in a blast furnace before it can be turned into an ingot

![Refined Enderscrap Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eacc6c8019fb2d2588a6003b4e489e456e85ae4.png)

Below are the rest of the normal recipes _(Note: the upgrade recipe for endersteel works with all netherite tools and armor to make the endersteel counterparts)_

![Steel Ingot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/076db021a29dfe148357635632a44b9fbc32f8f4.png)

![Endersteel Ingot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65fa2be352dce307021d8c83de8671329f0e7ba5.png)

![Endersteel Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a8ec39afd87b9fa97fdcd2902cc1575574a552f.png)

Endersteel Upgrade templates can be found in end city chests.

# Discovered Issues
1. Endersteel items burn in fire and lava (mostly resolved as of v0.2)

# Maybe Coming to Future Versions
1. Steel Lamp (just an inverted redstone lamp)
2. Steel Ladders (faster ladders)
3. Steel Rails (faster minecart rails)
4. Enderwood (cool purple wood type)
5. Make steel and endersteel an armor trim material
